title: Dekton Rapid Bar Clamp Professional-High Clamping Pressure| Quick-release Mechanism| Durable & Strong Grip| Abs Handle And Rotation Button| Converts From Clamp To Spreader In Seconds| 45kg Clamp Force
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Professional-Grade Clamping Pressure: The Dekton Rapid Bar Clamp delivers high clamping pressure, ensuring a secure and stable hold on your materials. With a robust clamping force of up to 45kg, it provides exceptional strength and reliability for various woodworking and construction projects.

Quick-Release Mechanism: Experience efficiency and ease with the quick-release mechanism integrated into the Dekton Rapid Clamp Professional. This feature allows you to swiftly adjust the tool's grip or switch between clamping and spreading modes without any hassle.

Durable & Strong Grip: Built for durability, the Dekton Rapid Clamp and Professional provides a robust and reliable grip with a clamping force of up to 45kg. This ensures that your materials stay securely in place during use, reducing the risk of slippage and improving the quality of your work.

ABS Handle and Rotation Button: The ergonomic ABS handle of the Dekton Rapid Clamp Professional is designed for comfort and control, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. Additionally, the rotation button allows for precise adjustments, giving you greater control over the clamping or spreading pressure.

Enhanced Clamping Force: Featuring a powerful 45kg clamp force, the Dekton Rapid Bar Clamp ensures a secure hold even under demanding conditions. Whether you're working with large panels or intricate assemblies, this clamp provides the strength needed to achieve accurate and reliable results.
description: From the manufacturer DEKTON products offer great value for money whilst incorporating useful features which improve performance and user experience. Where applicable, our products comply with the latest British and European regulations. All DEKTON products are manufactured to high quality standards that undergo excellent quality control through our partners worldwide.
